title: Bobbin Winding Tensioner Redesign
shortDesc: Redesigned roller mechanism to resolve misalignment and improve yarn tension consistency in a composite manufacturing environment.

title: HEPA Filtration Room Layout
shortDesc: Sealed enclosure design for carbon dust filtration in a plate cutting area, improving air quality and worker safety.

title: Shaft Coupling Assembly
shortDesc: Flexible shaft coupling designed for torque transmission between misaligned shafts in rotating machinery.

title: Pneumatic Cylinder Mount
shortDesc: Adjustable mounting bracket for double-acting pneumatic cylinders, designed for quick repositioning on automation rigs.

title: Conveyor Frame Structure
shortDesc: Structural frame for a belt conveyor system, modelled with bolted connections and standard structural profiles.

title: Bracket & Fastener Assembly
shortDesc: Multi-part bracket assembly with standard fasteners, modelled to verify fit and assembly clearance.
